text_preview:
SCADA Standards Appendix A 
HFC AWTP Master Plan 
Howard F. Curren AWTP 
SCADA Standards Appendix A ­
Definitions and General Reference 
January 2025 
123
artifact_summary: This document page displays two side-by-side screenshots of a SCADA system interface titled 'Modulating Valve Faceplate'. It illustrates the layout and data points for a specific reactor gate valve, including control source, valve status, and position parameters.
artifact_key_elements: Position Parameters (Position Ref, Manual Pos, Position Feedback)
artifact_blurb: This page from the SCADA Standards Appendix A presents two examples of a Modulating Valve Faceplate interface used for monitoring Reactor Gate No.3. The interface displays the control source set to Operator Mode, confirms the valve is at target, and shows position parameters with a reference of 40.0% and a feedback reading of 55.1%. The document is part of the HFC AWTP Master Plan for the Howard F. Curren Advanced Water Treatment Plant.
